candidates.title: Luxury Product Photo Editor Needed – Consistent Premium Shopify Hamper Images (13 Photos)
candidates.brief: Upwork · Hourly I’m launching a premium English-made gifting brand and need an experienced photo editor/retoucher to professionally edit 13 product/lifestyle hamper images for Shopify and web use. The goal is a clean, high-end, consistent luxury look across the full image set. Tasks include: * Consistent exposure, white balance, and colour grading * Match wicker tones and overall image warmth between photos * Improve lighting balance and contrast * Clean and refine backgrounds where needed * Remove distractions/equipment where possible * Subtle premium retouching while keeping images natural * Consistent shadows and depth * Prepare web-ready exports for Shopify * Maintain a quiet luxury / editorial aesthetic (Fortnum & Mason / Daylesford style) * Enhance visibility of the embossed leather badge/logo on the front centre of the hamper while keeping it natural and premium-looking * Remove t

candidates.title: Jewelry 3D CAD (Rhino/MatrixGold) + Photorealistic Rendering Specialist (Ecommerce/Amazon)
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price We're hiring a full-time 3D specialist to create/modify jewelry CAD and produce photorealistic ecommerce visuals for crystal stud earrings sold on Amazon and our website (seona.com). Output must look like real product photography — no CGI look — with consistent studio lighting, accurate color, and true scale. CORE DELIVERABLES (PER SKU / VARIANT) 3 product images + 1 on ear + 1 × 360° rotation video NON-NEGOTIABLE QUALITY STANDARDS - Clean background - Accurate crystal colors + metal finish - Natural reflections (not overly glossy) - Consistent lighting + scale across all shots THE 4 REQUIRED IMAGES (SHOT LIST) - Main Hero: centered, minimal shadow, product fills ~80–85% of frame - Angled View: 30–45°, shows setting depth + prongs + lock/back - Macro Detail: sharp facets + prongs, no blur or effects - On-Ear (True-to-Size): accurate placement, minimal styling 1 unive

candidates.title: Shopify Product Photo Editor — Background Removal & Centering
candidates.brief: I run an online sports card store (pushingpacks.com) and need a photo editor to process product images taken on iPhone for upload to Shopify. What the job involves: Remove background from product photos (trading cards, graded PSA slabs, sealed hobby boxes) Center the product on a clean white or transparent background Resize and export to Shopify's recommended dimensions (2048 x 2048px) Deliver files named to match Shopify product handles for easy upload Maintain a consistent look across all product images Volume: Approximately 85 products with 2- 5 images each to start, with ongoing work as new inventory is added. Requirements: Proficient in Photoshop, Canva Pro, or equivalent Experience with Shopify product image standards Clean, consistent results — cards must be straight, centered, no shadows Fast turnaround (24–48 hours per batch) Attention to detail — these are collectibles worth up

replacement_note: GEN-FREE replacement for a removed generative-expand task. NO image_generative_expand, NO generative fill/outpaint, NO upscale. O8 stock-hero = license a correctly-sized stock image + crop/reframe + place logo (NOT expand a small image).
